Title: Initiate Document Process
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the main screen.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on "Avvia Documento".
2. System displays "Aggiungi Documento" option.
Expected Result: The system successfully transitions from "Avvia Documento" to "Aggiungi Documento".

Title: Add Document
Preconditions: User has initiated the document process.
Test Steps:
1. User selects "Aggiungi Documento".
2. System prompts for document details.
Expected Result: The system prompts the user to add document details.

Title: Navigate to Monitoring Section
Preconditions: User is on the home page.
Test Steps:
1. User accesses the menu from the home page.
2. User selects "SI" to navigate to the monitoring section.
Expected Result: User successfully navigates to the monitoring section.

Title: Navigate to Notes Section
Preconditions: User is on the home page.
Test Steps:
1. User accesses the menu from the home page.
2. User selects "NO" to navigate to the notes section.
Expected Result: User successfully navigates to the notes section.

Title: Return to Home Page
Preconditions: User is in the monitoring or notes section.
Test Steps:
1. User selects "NO" to return to the menu.
2. User selects "NO" again to return to the home page.
Expected Result: User returns to the home page.

Title: Handle Google Sign-In Task
Preconditions: User is on the login screen.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on "handleSignInTask".
2. System verifies Google credentials.
Expected Result: System successfully handles the sign-in task and logs in the user.

Title: Join Family Activity
Preconditions: User is on the login screen.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on "joinFamilyActivity".
2. System redirects to family activity screen.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the family activity screen.

Title: Replace Fragment
Preconditions: User is on the home screen.
Test Steps:
1. User triggers fragment replacement action.
2. System replaces current fragment with new one.
Expected Result: Current fragment is replaced with the new one.

Title: Abandon Google Sign-In Client
Preconditions: User is on the profile screen.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on "abbandona".
2. System calls GoogleSignInClient to log out.
Expected Result: User is logged out and returned to the login screen.

Title: Call Graph Connect View
Preconditions: User is on the graph connect fragment.
Test Steps:
1. User triggers graph connect view action.
2. System calls graph connect view.
Expected Result: Graph connect view is successfully called.
